description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock features a smooth, reddish-brown finish with a slightly curved butt and a pronounced grip area. The receiver and bolt assembly are metallic, with the bolt handle clearly visible on the right side. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the wooden fore-end, giving the rifle a balanced, traditional silhouette. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, and the trigger guard is metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for hunting or marksmanship.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long blued barrel, and iron sights. The design is classic and robust, featuring a metallic bolt and trigger assembly.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the bolt handle protruding from the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic components, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the stock, trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel.
